utility_evaluation.REASONING:

- financing: includes financing solution with terms (type, loan amount, LTV, interest rate, term, monthly payment, down payment, arrangement fee) — fully specified.
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (package, cost, features) — fully specified.
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (package, cost, features) — fully specified.
- setup_services: includes utility and setup services (utilities package, cost, features; plus survey cost) — fully specified.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown (property purchase, down payment, total additional services, monthly payment, detailed breakdown) — fully specified.
All 6 items are present and fully detailed.
